title: Ghusl (Ritual Bath)
description: Performing ghusl on Friday is a sunnah that purifies and prepares you for the blessed day.

title: Wearing Clean Clothes
description: Wear your best and cleanest clothes for Jumu'ah as a sign of respect and preparation for the blessed gathering.

title: Using Miswak (Toothbrush)
description: Using miswak or brushing your teeth before Jumu'ah is highly recommended and brings great reward.

title: Early Arrival
description: Arrive early to the masjid. The earlier you come, the greater the reward. Try to be there before the khateeb arrives.

title: Reading Surah Al-Kahf
description: Reading Surah Al-Kahf on Friday brings light and protection. Join our Kahf Circle at 12:30 PM to read it together.
arabic: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَةَ الْكَهْفِ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ

title: Sending Salawaat
description: Increase your salawaat (blessings) upon the Prophet (peace be upon him) throughout Friday.

title: Listening Attentively
description: When the khateeb begins, give your full attention. Avoid talking or distractions during the khutbah.
arabic: إِذَا قُلْتَ لِصَاحِبِكَ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ أَنْصِتْ
